node.title: Amazon L6 | BLR | Uber L5a | HYD

article.title: Amazon L6 | BLR | Uber L5a | HYD
article.content:
Hello Community, 
The last few months have been hell of a ride. 

I got an offer today from Amazon for L6 position, and 2 days ago for Uber L5a
Help me decide.

Current Comp
Base: 42L
Bonus: 4L
Stocks: 24L/year
Total Comp: 70LPA

Amazon L6
Base: 92L
Bonus: 45 Year1, 36 Year2
Stocks: 550 units (~1.2Cr)
Total Comp (1.43Cr Y1, 1.46Cr Y2, 1.4Cr Y3, 1.4Cr Y4)

Uber L5a
Base: 70L (Excluding PF) ~ 74L (including)
Bonus: ~ 13.5L
Stocks: 150k (~34L/year)
Total Comp: (~1.21Cr /year)
I think i might be eligible for a sign on bonus as well now.

What do you think?
Which one would you choose?

Posting the experience in a different thread, will add link here.

post.content: Nirmala Tai must be so proud

✅ Total Tax Payable

👉 ₹38.70 L (base)

₹5.81 L (surcharge)

₹1.78 L (cess)
= ~ ₹46.29 L per year 😓

Amazon is clear winner here in terms of comp. 
In terms of WLB, both companies remain on same scale. Even Uber has PIP culture.

Verdict - I would suggest choosing the one with higher base (cash component).

Good luck

If you are already leading team in current org, then amazon L6 might be better to keep getting similar level work.\nUber L5 is better if you are mid senior level right now as you can understand product there and keep working for next level in parallel.
Can you please share your interview experience as well? I have my L5a rounds scheduled.
Not sure if they are even comparable, Amazon is better clearly.
Congratulations OP for cracking different ORGs! Can you please share your interview experience at Uber?\nThanks!
Congratulations! Could you share your interview experience?
Congratulations, If you can survive Amazon go to Amazon.\nTC diff is too high to choose Uber
Amazon not worth it. they might lay you off after 6 month\nI think you have 8+ yoe so negotiate with uber for l5b
